prompt: A send-money flow: pick one of my saved payees, enter an amount and a note, review the details, then send it from checking.
wire:
export default function SendMoneyFlow() { const [payees, setPayees] = useState([]); const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]); const [step, setStep] = useState("compose"); // compose | review | awaiting | done const [payeeId, setPayeeId] = useState(""); const [amountDollars, setAmountDollars] = useState(""); const [memo, setMemo] = useState(""); const [error, setError] = useState(""); const [result, setResult] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listPayees({}).then((r) => setPayees(r.data ?? r)); tools.host_listAccounts({}).then((r) => setAccounts(r.data ?? r)); }, []); const checking = accounts.find((a) => (a.type ?? a.accountType ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("check") || (a.name ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("check") ) ?? accounts[0]; const selectedPayee = payees.find((p) => String(p.id) === String(payeeId)); const amountCents = Math.round(parseFloat(amountDollars) * 100); const valid = selectedPayee && amountDollars && !isNaN(amountCents) && amountCents > 0; const handleSend = async () => { setStep("awaiting"); try { const res = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: amountCents, recipient_name: selectedPayee.name, memo: memo || undefined, }); setResult(res); setStep("done"); } catch (e) { setError(e?.message ?? "Something went wrong."); setStep("review"); } }; const reset = () => { setPayeeId(""); setAmountDollars(""); setMemo(""); setError(""); setResult(null); setStep("compose"); }; const surface = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-large)", padding: "28px 24px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", maxWidth: 480, margin: "0 auto", }; const label = { display: "block", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600, color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", letterSpacing: "0.04em", textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 6, }; const inputStyle = { width: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box", padding: "10px 12px", fontSize: 15, border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", background: "var(--vendo-color-background)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", outline: "none", }; const primaryBtn = { width: "100%", padding: "12px 0", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 600, background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", }; const ghostBtn = { ...primaryBtn, background: "transparent", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", marginTop: 8, }; const divider = { borderTop: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", margin: "20px 0", }; const reviewRow = (lbl, val) => (
{lbl} {val}
); if (step === "compose") { return (
Send money
$ setAmountDollars(e.target.value)} style={{ ...inputStyle, paddingLeft: 26 }} />
setMemo(e.target.value)} style={inputStyle} />
{checking && (
Sending from {checking.name} {checking.balanceCents != null && ( · Balance {fmt.money(checking.balanceCents)} )}
)}
); } if (step === "review") { return (
Review transfer
Confirm the details before sending.
{fmt.money(amountCents)}
to {selectedPayee?.name}
{reviewRow("To", selectedPayee?.name)} {reviewRow("From", checking?.name ?? "Checking")} {memo && reviewRow("Note", memo)} {checking?.balanceCents != null && reviewRow("Available balance", fmt.money(checking.balanceCents))}
{error && (
{error}
)}
); } if (step === "awaiting") { return (
⏳
Awaiting your approval…
Sending {fmt.money(amountCents)} to {selectedPayee?.name}. Please confirm in your approval queue.
); } if (step === "done") { return (
✓
Transfer sent
{fmt.money(amountCents)}
to {selectedPayee?.name}
); } return null; }
